name: Natural Deodorant (Paste / Stick / Roll-On)
description: A multi-format deodorant using three independent odor-control mechanisms: antimicrobial coconut oil, pH-shifting baking soda, and moisture-absorbing arrowroot.
effectivenessNote: Excellent odor control for most people. -3 vs commercial antiperspirants because it doesn't block sweat. Heavy sweaters may reapply midday.
warnings: Does NOT stop sweating — odor control only
Baking soda causes rash in ~15–20% of people — use magnesium hydroxide instead
Coconut oil melts above 76°F — paste may liquify in summer
2–4 week transition period from commercial antiperspirant
scienceNote: Odor = bacteria metabolizing sweat proteins. Three independent mechanisms: coconut oil kills bacteria (lauric acid), baking soda/MgOH creates hostile pH, arrowroot manages moisture.
